title: Samurai Last Charge Action
description: A sophisticated cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 depicting a samurai's final charge at dawn from a burning castle gate, featuring complex camera work and sound cues.
promptText:
Reference Image:
@image1
[CONDITION DEFINITION]
Approximately 15 seconds, cinematic, high-precision historical action short. Use the person in the reference image as the sole character anchor, maintaining gender, facial features, eye impression, hairstyle, hair color, sense of age, armor structure, color scheme, cloth decorations, and weapons to depict them as the same person. If the reference image is live-action, depict it as high-quality live-action; if it is anime/illustration, depict it as high-quality anime footage while maintaining the original lines, coloring, and texture, without changing the art style midway. Do not inherit the solid background, standing posture, standby pose, or composition of the reference image.

The setting is a Japanese castle on the verge of falling just before dawn. From a burning castle gate, the mounted warrior from the reference image leads a small group of cavalry to begin a final charge. The main character is always the single reference person in the lead. The small group of cavalry are auxiliary presences briefly seen behind or around them.

[OPTIONAL PERFORMER LOOK]
A warrior who is brave and elegant, conveying a sense of resolve at the risk of their life. Do not cover the face too much with smoke or hair, ensuring they are recognizable as the same person even while riding. Do not change armor, cloth decorations, or weapons midway.

[SHOT / FLOW]
0.0–3.5s: Departure from the collapsing castle gate. Low pull showing the burning gate, crumbling wooden doors, smoke, sparks, and torn flags; the mounted warrior rushes out immediately after the wood collapses. Use short jet cuts to continuously show eyes, hair, hands gripping reins, weapon handles, swaying armor and cloth, and hooves kicking the ground.

3.5–8.0s: High-speed acceleration and arrow barrage. Track hooves and front legs from an ultra-low rear diagonal position, emphasizing dust clouds. Close up on the face, showing an expression of sharp focus forward despite violent vibrations. Switch to high-speed side tracking, showing castle walls, fire, flags, and enemy soldiers flowing by quickly. Arrows rain down from above and in front; the warrior ducks to evade. The camera swiftly moves from front diagonal to side for a three-dimensional charge.

8.0–12.5s: Impact and breakthrough of the enemy front line. Rows of spears and shields loom ahead. From a low front position, the warrior and horse rush toward the camera, pulling away just before impact. The warrior does not stop, changing course to dive into gaps in the spears, striking an enemy spear once with their weapon, scattering short metal sparks. Rapidly switch between hooves, eyes, reins, weapon-spear contact, armor, horse shoulders, and dust clouds, breaking through the line while maintaining speed.

12.5–15.0s: Linger without stopping speed. Emerge from the dust and continue running toward the battlefield illuminated by the sunrise. Behind are the burning castle, collapsed gates, chaotic enemy lines, and torn flags. Ahead is the golden sunrise. The warrior does not stop, briefly turning their head or staring straight ahead while continuing to run. Finally, the camera pulls up and back to capture the lead reference person, the small cavalry, the burning castle, and the dawn battlefield in one frame. Do not conclude success or death, ending with a lingering sense of bravery and pathos.

[CAMERA / EDITING]
Very dynamic 8–10 cut composition. Uses low pulls of the burning gate, eye close-ups, reins/weapon close-ups, ultra-low hoof tracking, high-speed side tracking, rapid frontal approaches, diagonal-to-side rotations, high-speed push-ins on the enemy line, and rising aerial views after the breakthrough. Do not fix the camera on the horse's full body from a distance or side for long. Switch quickly between hooves, front legs, shoulders, face, torso, hands, armor, and weapons to express the horse's weight and speed. Jet cuts of the face or feet are 0.2–0.6s, main actions are 0.8–1.5s, only the final lingering shot is 1.5–2s. Flow the background at high speed, enhancing speed with wind pressure, dust, sparks, hair, and cloth decorations.

[SOUND]
Do not include BGM. No music, singing, or narration. Sound effects and ambient sounds only. Emphasize heavy hoofbeats, ground vibrations, clinking armor and metal ornaments, reins, short metal clashes of weapons and spears, whistling arrows, fire, crumbling wood, flags, wind, dust, and distant shouts.

[NEGATIVE]
No text, subtitles, logos, watermarks, real family crests, brands, UI, split screens, collages, the reference image itself, or character sheets on solid backgrounds. Do not increase the number of protagonists. Do not make a different person the protagonist. Do not change gender, face, hairstyle, hair color, age, armor, color scheme, cloth decorations, weapons, or art style midway. No disappearance, deformation, duplication, or switching of weapons. Avoid fusion or duplication of horse/rider, abnormal leg counts, or unnatural giant jumps. Avoid long-distance fixed views, monotonous side movement, long straight runs, quiet departures, long slow-motion, static poses, excessive fantasy, glowing weapons, mechanical armor, giant fire effects, overly dark screens, low contrast, muddy smoke, or characters buried in fire/smoke.

title: Ancient Tree Guardian Fantasy Transformation
description: An ultra-cinematic 15-second sequence showing a lone traveler transforming into a majestic humanoid tree guardian in an ancient forest.
promptText:
15-second ultra-cinematic fantasy transformation sequence deep within an ancient primordial forest at dawn.

A lone traveler stands in a sacred forest clearing surrounded by colossal trees older than kingdoms. Golden morning light filters through the canopy while mist drifts across the moss-covered ground.

The atmosphere is peaceful, ancient, and alive.

The camera slowly circles around the traveler as the forest begins responding to their presence. Leaves rustle despite the absence of wind. Birds fall silent. Tiny glowing spores drift through the air.

Roots emerge gently from the earth around the traveler's feet.

The transformation begins.

Thin root structures spread across the skin like living veins. Moss and bark textures gradually appear along the arms and neck. Small leaves sprout from the shoulders and hair.

The camera pushes closer as the body becomes increasingly intertwined with nature. Fingers lengthen into branch-like structures. The skin develops intricate bark patterns while glowing sap-like energy flows beneath the surface.

The surrounding forest awakens. Flowers bloom instantly. Vines climb nearby trees. Ancient roots rise from the earth in response to the transformation.

The transformation accelerates.

Massive branches grow from the back like a living crown. The body expands in size and strength. Moss, vines, leaves, and flowering plants spread naturally across the growing wooden form.

Birds, butterflies, and forest creatures gather around the transforming figure as if witnessing the return of an ancient protector.

At the climax, the traveler becomes an Ancient Tree Guardian , a majestic humanoid giant composed of living wood, roots, bark, moss, flowers, and glowing emerald sap.

The forest itself appears connected to the guardian through an immense network of roots extending beneath the ground.

Final cinematic moment: the Ancient Tree Guardian places a giant hand against the earth. A wave of life spreads through the forest. Trees bloom, rivers sparkle, and sunlight floods the woodland as the camera pulls back to reveal the colossal guardian standing among the ancient giants.

Style: ultra cinematic fantasy realism, living forest transformation, realistic bark and root growth, moss and vegetation simulation, primordial forest atmosphere, volumetric dawn light, magical nature realism, majestic environmental storytelling, AAA fantasy film quality, no text, no overlays.

Audio: epic nature-inspired orchestral score, forest ambience, creaking wood, growing roots, birdsong, flowing water, rustling leaves, deep natural resonance, atmospheric wonder and majesty.

description: An incredibly detailed 15-second single-shot video prompt for a motocross jump, focusing on character consistency, technical stunts, and realistic physical effects.
promptText: Create a 15-second ultra-cinematic single-shot extreme off-road motorcycle video. Image hf_20260618_193451_5e17d142-cdf2-4356-80a5-7dc057741c77 is the reference for the character's image, clothing, and motorcycle. Facial reference: maintain her fair skin, black eyes, hair, body proportions, flowing skirt, and the same motorcycle. The scene is set on a sunny day on a dusty mountain road, surrounded by rocky hills, loose gravel, and cliffs, creating a raw off-road atmosphere. Use a continuous 15-second shot without any cuts, hidden cuts, transitions, or montages. The shot starts close to her upper body and face as she rides, then smoothly pans behind her and stays in that position until the end of the video. The camera stays close behind her back, seat, and rear wheel at a low height, making both her and the motorcycle occupy most of the frame. The entire shoot must not feel like following from a distance with dust kicking up. After moving behind her, she immediately performs an elegant and precise front-wheel lift in a smooth wheelie-like posture, with the camera focused on her posture and the motorcycle's balance. Then, she continues riding on the rugged road, using masterful technical moves and subtle body shifts to easily navigate bumps and gravel before accelerating towards a cliff edge. She leaps over a canyon gap in a long-distance jump. While airborne, time enters dramatic slow motion, but the motorcycle progresses toward the opposite ridge. The camera stays low and close behind the motorcycle. During the slow-motion flight, she performs a spectacular freestyle motocross stunt. She lifts her hips off the seat, pushing her body out and up in a bold acrobatic pose. Her torso opens outward as if briefly leaving the motorcycle behind. Visual focus is on the separation of her body from the motorcycle while maintaining connection through hands and control points. Her face remains visible with hair and skirt fluttering. After holding the pose, she pulls the motorcycle back, returns to the seat, and re-adjusts her center of gravity as slow motion ends. She lands cleanly on the opposite ridge with intense suspension compression, and the camera follows closely. After landing, she maintains control and continues for a short distance. title: Ancient Chinese Rom-Com Mini-Drama
description: A highly detailed multi-scene video script for generating a 15-second ancient Chinese period drama with specific character consistency and comedic timing.
promptText:
Generate a 15-second 9:16 vertical ancient costume light comedy short play 'Room Secret Art'. Refer to the close-up and three-view drawings of @Figure 1, maintaining the same face, hairstyle, and clothing of the female lead, with a wealthy young lady's elegant temperament; refer to the close-up and three-view drawings of @Figure 2, maintaining the same face, hairstyle, and clothing of the male lead, with a handsome nobleman's temperament. Do not generate subtitles or text on the screen.

Scene: Nighttime ancient-style nobleman's study with rosewood desk, ancient books, bamboo slips, candlesticks, celadon tea cups, wooden lattice windows, and light gauze curtains. Outside is light rain and cold blue moonlight; inside is warm golden candlelight, creating a cold-warm contrast. Shallow depth of field, soft focus lens, high-end female-oriented ancient costume drama texture. Roof beam diagrams, tile arrangement diagrams, and leak location sketches are scattered by the desk.

0-2s: The male lead sits at the desk, looking down intently at an old book, focused with a slightly furrowed brow. Footsteps are heard outside; he is startled, hurriedly closes the book, looks away with shifting eyes and slightly red ears, almost knocking over a teacup. The camera pushes in slowly toward his face. Soft ancient string music with a short pluck sound when the book closes.

2-4s: The female lead enters, her sleeves and hair fluttering in the night breeze. She sees him hiding the book, first confused, then her eyes land on the title 'Room Secret Art.' Her cheeks flush, eyes widen, looking shocked but trying to maintain her cool poise. She asks coldly: 'What... are you looking at?' tone restrained and annoyed. Cut to a half-body shot and eye close-up.

4-6.5s: The male lead stands up, hiding the book behind him suspiciously. He tries to stay composed but is clearly flustered, stuttering: 'It's not what you think, I'm just... studying room matters.' Tone nervous and awkward. The female lead's face turns redder, eyes turning from shock to annoyance. Music pauses with a slight comedic slide.

6.5-8.5s: The female lead walks quickly to the desk, pretending to be calm but visibly annoyed, grabbing the book. He tries to stop her but hesitates, looking helpless and aggrieved. She whispers: 'You still dare to hide it?' with the pressure of a wealthy lady. Camera follows the book movement with blurred candlelight in the foreground.

8.5-11s: The female lead opens the book. Close-up on pages showing roof beam diagrams and leak sketches, including a map of her own courtyard's roof leaks. She stops, her expression turning from annoyed to stiff and embarrassed, looking away and pursing her lips. The male lead stands beside her, saying sincerely: 'Your roof leaks, I wanted to fix it before telling you.' Music adds a light 'ding' sound for the reversal.

11-13s: She slowly closes the book, embarrassed but unwilling to admit the misunderstanding. She doesn't look at him, staring at the candle with red cheeks, whispering stubbornly: 'Then why did you blush?' Close-up on her with him blurred in the background.

13-15s: He looks at her with an innocent expression and a hint of a smile: 'Because just now... you thought out loud very loudly.' She freezes, face turning redder, stuffs the book back and walks away quickly. He catches the book and smiles at her back. Ends with a light comedic pluck sound.

Requirements: No subtitles/text; natural lip-sync and clear expressions; consistent characters (no face/hair/outfit changes); realistic filming texture; no illustrations, 2D, digital humans, or game modeling.

title: 90s Sci-Fi Anime Transition Sequence
description: A detailed one-shot sequence prompt for a 90s-style military anime, utilizing eye-match cuts and complex camera movements to transition between six characters.
promptText:
A one-shot sequence of a 90s cel-shaded sci-fi military anime. The BGM features a low drone and heartbeat, no dialogue, with environmental sounds.

# Constraints
Basically, the camera never stops, constantly moving forward or rotating. The camera passes by the subjects and enters the darkness beyond. Specifically, the shots include a vertical ascent from underground, an entry into a pupil, and a 360-degree bullet-time rotation at the climax. No flashes or pulses for lighting; full-screen whiteouts are prohibited. Strictly adhere to the facial, hair, and equipment features of the reference images for each character. If quality is low, recreate images from scratch as references. 4K high definition, no noise, no blur, no flicker. Maintain consistency in character faces and clothing, no distortion, natural and smooth movement.

# Characters
(Characters 1-6 with reference image markers)

# Setting
A ruined futuristic city at night. Rubble, hangars, pipe-filled passages, rising steam, underground sewers, battlefield smoke. Lighting: Dull orange from distant fires, thin moonlight blue. Large areas of darkness with localized light sources. Six warriors stand in different locations within the same nocturnal battlefield.

# Scene
A one-shot sequence where the camera 'swims' through the darkness, visiting six warriors in turn. The first half passes through rubble, pipes, and steam to visit three; the fourth appears via a vertical ascent. The fifth relays through the darkness of a pupil to the sixth's battlefield, ending with a luxurious 360-degree bullet-time sequence of the sixth character firing a weapon.

(Detailed cut descriptions for cuts 1 through 6 involving character interactions and environmental sounds.)

title: Pixar Style Family Bedtime Comedy
description: A cinematic 3D animation prompt for a humorous family scene where a toddler chaotically takes over the bed, styled in a Pixar-inspired aesthetic.
promptText:
15-second animated 3D comedy scene in a Pixar-style cartoon aesthetic. A cozy family bedroom at night, soft moonlight, warm atmosphere, big bed with mom, dad, and a 1–2 year old toddler sleeping in the middle. The toddler looks tiny, innocent, and peaceful — but sleeps like a chaotic little king, taking over the whole bed.

0–4 sec: wide shot of the family sleeping. Mom and dad are clearly exhausted, lying awkwardly at the edges of the bed, while the toddler is spread out in the center, occupying way too much space. The moment should already feel funny and painfully relatable for parents.

4–7 sec: while still fully asleep, the toddler suddenly lifts one little foot and kicks dad in the cheek. Dad instantly wakes up with a shocked, confused expression, frozen in disbelief, trying to process what just happened.

7–10 sec: a second later, the toddler rolls a bit, still asleep, and kicks mom in the side with the other leg. Mom wakes up in total confusion, slightly annoyed but too tired to react properly, looking at the toddler like this is a nightly routine.

10–15 sec: mom and dad slowly look at each other in exhausted silence, both with that deeply relatable “we haven’t slept properly in years” expression. Their faces should feel extremely relatable, like every parent who has ever tried to sleep with a toddler sees themselves in this moment. The toddler remains peacefully asleep in the middle with an innocent angelic face, completely unaware of the chaos.

Make the parents’ facial expressions extremely relatable, like every parent who has ever tried to sleep with a toddler. Make the humor cringe, painfully accurate, and universally recognizable for moms and dads. Exaggerated cartoon timing, expressive faces, cozy family chaos, soft physical comedy, no injury, no violence, only funny bedtime struggle.

Style: Pixar-style 3D animation, cinematic composition, expressive character acting, warm lighting, cozy blankets, natural family bedroom details, smooth camera movement, comedic pacing.

No text, no subtitles, no logos.

She walks outside and rolls her bicycle into the morning sunlight. Cinematic tracking shots as she checks tire pressure, adjusts the seat, tests the brakes, and secures her helmet. Hero moment as she stands beside her bicycle, ready to ride. Slow-motion shots of her smiling confidently before pushing off. The journey ends at a picturesque viewpoint overlooking nature. She parks her bicycle, takes a deep breath, and enjoys the peaceful surroundings. Final cinematic drone pull-back showing her standing beside the bike as the sun rises higher in the sky.

title: iPhone Handheld Street Encounter Video
description: A highly technical prompt designed to simulate realistic, unedited-style iPhone street footage. It features specific camera behaviors like handheld shakes, autofocus delays, and CCD sensor artifacts to depict a candid street interaction between a model and a pedestrian.
promptText: Rendered in the style of unprocessed authentic iPhone handheld video footage, with all camera settings on automatic and no post-processing color grading or special effects. The image includes realistic handheld micro-shaking and the sense of the operator's (bystander) breathing, with the lens naturally sinking or tilting due to walking before quickly correcting. Autofocus occasionally searches, delays, or briefly loses focus, especially during following motions or hand movements. Automatic white balance naturally switches between cool and warm tones as street light and tree shadows change. The overall image is flat, preserving real lens flares, slight chromatic aberration at the edges, and optical imperfections like motion blur. Simulates CCD sensor effects with slight vertical smearing, color bleeding, grain noise, and purple/green fringes on high-contrast edges. Only uses in-camera natural environmental sound effects, including street traffic, footsteps, and wind through leaves; the microphone may slightly distort when people speak. Uses a street third-person bystander perspective (shot by a nearby passerby), with lens movement following the bystander's instinctive reactions. Retain 100% of the model's age, facial features, bone structure, eye distance, jaw geometry, temperament, skin tone, and hairstyle from the reference image. No skin smoothing, over-softening, or shifting toward an 'average face.' 15-second timeline (Scene: Phone misunderstanding -> Woman thinks she's being insulted -> Embarrassed turn -> Reversal): At 0s, the lens shakes slightly from a bystander perspective, aiming at a street lined with golden sycamores. A slender, long-haired woman in a mask and specific outfit walks toward the camera. On the right, a man in a black jacket is on the phone. Ambient traffic sounds are natural. Autofocus locks on their interaction; slight overexposure and CCD grain are visible. At 1-3s, as the woman approaches, the man yells into his phone, 'You dare go out dressed like that?' The woman stops and glares angrily. The man looks at her innocently and shows his phone screen. The lens follows slightly with a brief autofocus search and noticeable CCD smearing. At 4-7s, the woman looks embarrassed, apologizes, and continues walking. The man continues his loud phone conversation. The lens follows her naturally with slight walking jitters. At 8-11s, after walking away, the woman suddenly turns back and raises her hand as if to strike the man. The man looks bewildered and shows his phone again. The bystander lens turns quickly to follow, with autofocus lag and handheld jitters intensifying. Microphones capture the angry woman and the man's helpless explanation. At 12-15s, she finally waves dismissively and leaves. The lens tilts slightly as the bystander shifts weight. The overall feel is an unprocessed, handheld street interaction with documentary-level natural imperfections.

title: Chain-Reaction Comedy Short Script
description: A creative prompt for a 15-second comedy short using Seedance 2.0. The script describes a series of fast-paced misunderstandings triggered by a gamer's phone call, including character cues and shot transitions.
promptText:
[Style] Fast-paced chain-reaction comedy (Chain-Reaction Comedy), bright saturated colors, high-speed quick cuts, multi-scene jump cuts, 4K HD.
[Duration] 15 seconds
[Characters] A boy who says the wrong thing casually (casual hoodie, innocent face) + three groups of passers-by who mishear (each with their own imagination).
[00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Casual Remark (The Spark)
The boy is on the phone on the street, making a casual remark.
[Dialogue Lip-sync Guidance] Boy: "I'm planning to... blow up that building!" (Actually talking about a game)
Quick cut: The newspaper in the hands of the old man on the bench behind him shakes, his pupils dilate in shock.
[00:04-00:09] Shot 2: Misunderstanding Spreads (Escalation)
Rapidly jump cut between three scenes—
The old man rushes into a convenience store in a panic to make a call; the store owner mishears and thinks someone is going to rob the place, grabbing a mop; the internet celebrity at the next table holds up their phone and starts broadcasting "breaking news." With each cut, subtitles fly out showing their ridiculous imaginations. Accompanied by tense yet funny BGM.
[00:09-00:15] Shot 3: Truth Revealed (Punchline)
Wide shot: The boy hangs up the phone and looks up—surrounded by a circle of people: the old man, the store owner with a mop, the influencer with a phone, and a square dancing troupe arriving from afar. The boy looks bewildered.
[Dialogue Lip-sync Guidance] The boy holds his phone and weakly explains: "...I was talking about that building in Minecraft?"
The scene goes silent for three seconds, everyone facepalms. Freeze frame, accompanied by a huge "ding—" sound effect of a failure.

title: Siren Pose office drama with apocalyptic twist
description: A detailed two-act video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a workplace drama involving a 'Siren Pose' that shifts from office tension to a surreal apocalyptic meteor strike. Includes natural audio cues and handheld iPhone cinematography style.
promptText:
Act 1: Global Rules: No background music, use only in-camera natural sound effects. Unprocessed iPhone handheld footage, all settings on automatic, filmed from a first-person employee perspective, low-angle looking up from a sofa in a minimalist Japanese office—no lighting effects, no color grading, automatic white balance flickering between warm and cool as the lens moves between window sunlight and indoor shadows. Slight handheld breathing jitter and real-time reactive shaking, occasional autofocus hunting, slight compositional shifts, and edge halos to create a realistic 'caught on my phone' feel. Start directly with an ultra-realistic live-action scene (highly consistent facial features: mature female boss, refined features, cold but seductive temperament, wearing image_20260606135528_319_19, dignified with high-end luster, fabric showing real texture under natural light). Natural lighting, no fill light, all characters are adults. [00:00-00:03] I (camera) wearing black trousers and leather shoes look up with a slight low-angle shake from the office sofa (handheld breathing jitter, like I'm exhausted from overtime sitting on the floor), autofocus briefly hunts then quickly locks onto the female boss. She elegantly crouches/leans in, body naturally forming a cold 'Siren Pose': slight S-curve, elongated neck/shoulders, hip pushed slightly to the side, legs crossed and elongated, half-closed eyes staring coldly at the camera. [00:03-00:06] Female boss maintains Siren Pose, leaning down slightly closer (maintaining a clear safe distance), one hand naturally supporting herself on the sofa armrest, fingers lightly touching her neck or lip, semi-sheer shirt fluttering slightly with movement. Low, magnetic, restrained cold voice says: "Working so late... as your boss, I've come to check on your status personally." (Voice clear and natural, accompanied by slight fabric friction). [00:06-00:09] She maintains the S-curve Siren Pose, eyes cold with professional scrutiny, fingers slowly stroking her neck or pushing up glasses/hair, legs crossed showing high-end luster in natural light. Camera tilts back slightly (my nervous reaction), autofocus briefly shifts then recovers, edge halos and warm/cool white balance flickers appear. [00:09-00:12] Sudden absurd reversal: She snaps upright (dry and powerful movement, legs quickly retract, Siren Pose instantly broken), quickly pulls a giant red double-sided stamp from behind the desk (diameter as wide as a washbasin, engraved with 'Excellent' and 'Fired'), while unrolling a super-long performance ranking scroll, slamming it onto the sofa with a loud 'thwack', and raising the giant stamp to strike, expression turning cold and serious. [00:12-00:15] She turns toward the desk, scroll and giant stamp still shaking in hand, serious tone with sharp contrast: "Every day this month, overtime must reach 12 hours, or prepare for punishment." Camera shakes as she stands, automatic exposure compensates with flickers. Ends with natural office environment and trailing prop sounds. Sound: Mature magnetic boss voice, cold/restrained (ambiguous part) → suddenly serious/powerful during reversal. Office ambient sounds (AC hum, paper), silk shirt friction, loud 'thwack' of scroll unrolling, heavy sound of giant stamp being raised, natural mic wind noise/slight distortion. Overall feel like a real first-person office overtime vlog, contrasting the professional Siren Pose with the absurd giant props.

Act 2: Global Rules: Same as Act 1. Start with ultra-realistic live-action scene (consistent facial features: mature boss hf_20260617_232600_51d878a7-0e46-47e1-969e-b9d76667762e, standing by the desk). [00:00-00:03] (Seamless transition) I (camera) have stood up facing the boss by the desk, frame shaking slightly, preparing to protest: "Boss, isn't this too much..." [00:03-00:07] Piercing firelight suddenly lights up the distant sky outside the window, a giant meteorite with a long flaming tail falls rapidly, emitting a growing low rumble, the whole office flushed red, autofocus briefly shifts to the window. Boss's expression turns instantly terrified looking outside. [00:07-00:11] I (camera) rush toward her (rapid forward shake), amidst doomsday vibrations, I let go of everything and whisper: "The world is ending anyway..." Boss shifts from terror to calm acceptance, Siren Pose re-emerges, eyes complex but relieved. [00:11-00:15] She looks at me calmly, slowly undoing the top button of her shirt, revealing her collarbone, voice low and trembling but seductive: "...Then let's do it now." Meteorite continues to fall outside causing intense light flickers and vibration, camera shakes chaotically ending on the doomsday office atmosphere. Sound: My protest and low whisper. Boss's voice shifting from terror to calm seduction. Giant meteor rumble/vibration, fabric button sound, breathing, heavy mic distortion. Overall natural transition from Act 1, creating a strong plot reversal from workplace power ambiguity to end-of-the-world abandon.

title: Biomechanical Leviathan Emergence
description: A dark, cinematic montage prompt for Seedance 2.0 depicting a massive biomechanical creature rising from the flooded ruins of a megacity during a storm.
promptText:
Montage, multi-shot cinematic, don't use one camera angle or 
single cut. Photorealistic, 35mm film quality, ARRI ALEXA 
aesthetic, film grain, apocalyptic color grade.

SUBJECT: Colossal biomechanical leviathan — matte black armored 
hull body shaped like an elongated war-vessel, single glowing red 
optical lens at the front, dozens of segmented mechanical tentacles 
extending from beneath the hull, organic pilot-entity fused at the 
rear — pale wired humanoid head with cybernetic tendrils, exposed 
pink bioluminescent core radiating energy through the chest. 
Follow @image_1.
ENVIRONMENT: Flooded ruined megacity at dusk — half-submerged 
skyscraper skeletons, dark storm clouds, still grey water 
reflecting the structure, distant intact skyline on the horizon.
MOOD: Submerged dormancy → rising awareness → full emergence.
MUSIC: Deep sub-bass drone building slowly, 50 BPM, distant thunder.
COLOR LOGIC: Storm-grey base — pink bioluminescent core the only 
warm light source.
LOGIC RULE: Maintain hull proportions, tentacle count and 
placement, pilot-entity position, and red lens across all shots.

SHOT 1: WS, 14mm low angle / The water surface is still. Then it 
begins to tremble — concentric ripples spreading outward as 
something vast shifts beneath. The red lens ignites first, 
piercing the murky water from below. / SFX: deep underwater 
rumble, water tension, distant thunder.
SHOT 2: ECU, 85mm static / The pink bioluminescent core at the 
pilot-entity's chest pulses once, then steadies into a slow 
rhythmic glow — like a heartbeat returning. Wired tendrils along 
the head twitch and extend slightly. / SFX: core pulse tone, 
organic servo whir.
SHOT 3: WS, 24mm rising / The hull breaks the surface — water 
cascading off the armored plating in heavy sheets, sending 
displacement waves rippling outward across the flooded ruins. 
Tentacles emerge one by one, water sliding off each segmented 
limb. / SFX: water displacement roar, mechanical joint sounds, 
cascading runoff.
SHOT 4: WS, 14mm low angle pull-back / Full silhouette now towers 
above the waterline against the storm sky, tentacles spreading 
wide for balance, the pilot-entity's head tilting back as the 
bioluminescent core flares brighter. Camera pulls back revealing 
the true scale against the ruined skyline. / SFX: full-scale 
reveal tone, thunder crack, core flare hum.

title: Cinematic Ink Demon Transformation Sequence
description: A highly detailed cinematic prompt for a dark fantasy sequence where a sketch inside an artist's studio comes to life, transforming the artist into an ink demon.
promptText:
15-second ultra-cinematic dark fantasy transformation sequence inside a lonely artist studio at night.

A human artist sits at a wooden desk under a single flickering lamp, sketching strange occult shapes inside an old sketchbook. Rain taps against the windows. The room is quiet, filled with paper, ink bottles, charcoal, torn drawings, and shadows.

Suddenly the black ink on the page begins moving by itself. It spreads across the sketchbook like liquid darkness, forming eyes, claws, and twisted symbols.

The camera slowly pushes closer as ink spills upward from the page instead of downward, floating into the air like living smoke. The artist freezes, staring in disbelief.

Thin black ink tendrils crawl from the sketchbook onto the artist’s hands and arms. The ink spreads across the skin like moving tattoos, rewriting the body with sharp manga-style lines, black veins, and liquid shadow patterns.

The transformation accelerates. Fingers lengthen into ink-black claws. The face becomes partially covered by dripping brushstroke shadows. Horn-like shapes form from splashing ink above the head.

Pages tear loose from the sketchbook and orbit around the artist. Each page shows animated drawings that move independently, screaming silently in charcoal lines.

The artist rises from the chair as the body becomes a living ink demon -half human, half sketch, made of black liquid ink, paper texture, jagged outlines, and distorted shadow anatomy.

Final cinematic moment: the Ink Demon fully emerges, stepping out from the collapsing sketchbook as the studio walls become covered in rapidly drawing occult illustrations. The creature opens glowing white eyes while ink drips upward into the darkness.

Style: ultra-cinematic dark fantasy, ink horror aesthetic, manga-inspired linework, liquid ink simulation, living sketch effects, gothic artist studio, black-and-white contrast with small warm lamp highlights, surreal transformation VFX, no text, no overlays.

Audio: dark cinematic score, rain on windows, pen scratching paper, ink bubbling, pages tearing, wet ink movement, low supernatural rumble, distorted breathing.

title: Breaking the Fourth Wall meta-horror video prompt
description: A complex multi-scene video prompt for Seedance 2.0 that creates a horror-comedy scenario where an AI character breaks out of a computer screen to grab the viewer. It features specific camera movements, lighting, and sound directions for a realistic vlog feel.
promptText:
Overall Style: Mobile vertical screen handheld feel, ordinary indoor computer desk scene, slight handheld shake, low-cost real selfie video texture, warm indoor lighting, blue cold light from the computer monitor, AI video 'fail' scene, horror-comedy atmosphere, breaking the fourth wall effect. No subtitles, no screen text overlays.

Audio Style:

Mobile phone live recording texture, slight room reverb, very weak computer fan sound and desk ambient noise. Male narration sounds like a casual short video吐槽 (complaint), female dialogue is slightly mechanical and eerie. No cinematic dubbing feel.

Shot 1 (0-4s)
Subject: A refined young Asian female @image, long black hair, white shirt, black tie, appearing in the computer screen like an AI-generated character.
Action: 
0-1s: Mobile camera aims at the computer screen, the girl in the screen approaches the camera, looking directly at the viewer.
1-2.5s: Male voice off-camera introduces the scene in a complaining tone.
2.5-4s: The girl tilts her head slightly, starts speaking, movement has the unnatural stutter of AI videos.
Dialogue:
Off-camera male voice: "Brothers, look at this AI video, something feels wrong."
Female, confused, slightly mechanical: "Huh? Say that again?"
Environment: Ordinary computer desk, monitor, keyboard, mouse, video editing software interface, background is a warm-toned wall.
Camera: Mobile vertical shoot, close-up on monitor and desk, slight handheld shake.
Style: Real mobile video, screen reflections, slight compression noise, everyday desk environment.
Constraint: The girl must always be a character inside the screen, do not have her appear in real space at the beginning.

Shot 2 (4-8s)
Subject: Real human arm and finger enter the frame, pointing at the girl in the computer screen.
Action:
4-6s: A real male hand extends from the bottom of the frame, index finger pointing at the girl's face on screen.
6-8s: The girl in the screen stares at the finger, expression becomes eerie, body starts leaning forward out of the screen.
Dialogue:
Off-camera male voice, provocative/joking: "I dare you to come out and hit me."
Environment: Computer screen showing video editing timeline, the person in the video is clearly visible.
Camera: Mobile camera moves slightly forward, finger in foreground, screen girl in mid-ground.
Style: Everyday selfie video turns into surreal thriller, space inside and outside the screen starts to mix.
Constraint: Maintain the clear relationship of the 'real finger pointing at the computer screen', the screen interface should not completely disappear.

Shot 3 (8-12s)
Subject: The girl in the screen breaks through the monitor, reaching out to grab the real human's hand.
Action:
8-10s: The computer screen shatters like glass, cracks and shards fly outward.
10-12s: The girl extends a hand from the screen, grabbing the real human's wrist, half her body still stuck in the monitor.
Dialogue:
Female, voice dropping, coldly repeating: "Come out... hit you?"
Environment: Computer desk vibrates, keyboard and monitor remain in place, broken screen edges emit blue-white light.
Camera: Sudden forward handheld movement, slight out-of-focus, creating a sense of panic.
Style: AI-fail surreal horror-comedy, glass shattering, screen space breaking through, character proportions slightly weird.
Constraint: The girl must come out from the screen, not appear out of thin air in reality; the grabbing action must be clear.

Shot 4 (12-15s)
Subject: The girl's half-body rushes out of the screen, firmly grabbing the real human's arm.
Action:
12-14s: She pulls the real human's hand forcefully, face close to the camera, expression stiff and eerie, fingers and wrist show slight AI deformation.
14-15s: Frame freezes at the absurd fail moment, glass shards suspended in the air, real arm held by her.
Dialogue:
Real male voice, panicked: "Wait! Holy crap! You really came out?"
Female, close to camera, coldly: "You told me to."
Environment: Computer desk, keyboard, broken monitor, remnants of video software interface.
Camera: Close-up handheld vertical screen, slight panic then freeze-frame, maintaining selfie video texture.
Style: Low-cost realism + AI-generated abnormality, horror-comedy, do not make it look like a high-end cinematic blockbuster.
Constraint: The frame should look like a random user-recorded AI video fail scene, preserving imperfect, weird, and absurd textures.

Negative Prompt: Subtitles, screen text overlay, over-cinematic, luxurious sets, clean commercial quality, horizontal composition, purely virtual scene, girl in real space at the start, computer screen disappears, finger relationship unclear, actions unreadable, character teleporting, face completely distorted, body melting, extra limbs, too many fingers, palms merging, monitor scale incorrect, too many glass shards blocking the subject, random text, garbled text, logo, watermark, severe blur, camera completely out of control, lip-sync severely drifting, dialogue and action out of sync, mouth not moving while talking.

title: Sci-fi Mecha Sword Duel
description: An extensive multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 that merges American comic style with 3D animation for an epic battle between a swordsman and a giant mecha.
promptText:
Duration: 14 seconds
Aspect Ratio: Widescreen Cinematic, 2.35:1
Type: Image-to-Video / Text-to-Video
Overall Style: American comic book storyboarding + 3D animation quality + Japanese swordsman action, grayish-blue storm battlefield, strong motion blur, epic mecha combat, camera pulled by energy as if out of control, yet maintaining high quality, coherence, and readability.

STYLE KEYFRAME (Uniform throughout)
The visuals feature 3D animation volumetric light, realistic storm fog, and metallic textures, while retaining American comic-style high-contrast shadows, thick outlines, exaggerated perspective, speed lines, and storyboard impact. Colors are mainly cold gray, steel blue, and black, with a small amount of white energy light. Character actions are sharp, and camera movements are very bold, as if an AI camera suddenly took control from the director, but with intentional, crazed choreography.

SHOT 1 (0-4s)
Subject: A young black-haired swordsman, long hair blowing in the gale, wearing dark damaged combat gear, arms wrapped in white bandages, a katana at his waist. The character's eyes emit a cold white light, expression calm and oppressive, as if about to release an ultimate move.
Action: 0-1s: Extreme close-up on the swordsman's lowered face, storm fog rushing past from both sides, hair covering half the face. 1-2s: The swordsman slowly looks up, eyes lighting up with white light, right hand forming a seal or starting posture by the face. 2-3s: The camera pulls close to his eyes and fingers, air begins to warp, and fine white energy flows appear. 3-4s: The swordsman crouches, hand on the hilt, ready for an instant draw. Hair, ribbons, and fog are all pulled back, creating a sense of compression before an explosion.
Environment: Gray-blue wasteland battlefield, low dark clouds, distant broken metal structures and giant mecha silhouettes, rain mist and dust in the air.
Camera: Extreme close-up opening, low-angle push-in, slight orbit around the character's face, then a sudden pull-back. Camera movement has a sense of loss of control but remains locked on the swordsman.
Style: High-contrast comic shadows, 3D character materials, cold white glowing eyes, visualized wind pressure, cinematic depth of field.

SHOT 2 (4-9s)
Subject: The swordsman draws and lunges, a giant black mecha or armored enemy emerges from the storm in the distance. The mecha is massive, with a steel shell and red or white sensor lights.
Action: 4-5s: Instant draw, body turning into a dark afterimage rushing into the distance. Dust and water mist kicked up from the ground. 5-6.5s: The camera is dragged by his dash, skimming low over the wasteland at high speed, with strong motion blur and speed lines at the edges. 6.5-8s: The mecha emerges from the fog, raising a giant mechanical arm to attack. The swordsman crosses the foreground at high speed, creating a scale contrast between the small foreground figure and the giant background mecha. 8-9s: The first slash cuts the air, a translucent white sword arc appearing. The arc is like a comic brushstroke but with 3D volume and realistic light scattering.
Camera: High-speed tracking shot, pushing low to the ground, sudden lateral whip-pan, then a fast push toward the mecha. Bold 'AI camera out-of-control' feel, but with clear action direction.
Style: Comic speed lines combined with 3D volumetric fog, sword arc like white ink slicing the air, cinematic motion blur.

SHOT 3 (9-14s)
Subject: The swordsman and the giant mecha clash head-on, swordsman using continuous high-speed slashes, mecha retaliating with mechanical arms.
Action: 9-10.5s: The mecha slams a heavy fist into the ground, swordsman slides away from the edge of the shockwave, camera rotating with his lateral roll. 10.5-12s: Two consecutive draw slashes, white sword arcs forming a cross trajectory in the air, like exaggerated action lines in comic storyboards but maintaining realistic spatial depth. 12-13s: Sudden pull-back, showing the giant mecha's body being sliced with bright cracks, sparks and metal fragments flying. 13-14s: Final freeze-frame feel: swordsman lands with his back to the camera, hair and cape blowing in the wind, behind him the mecha kneels in the storm, white sword arc light slowly dissipating.
Camera: Rapid tracking, lateral whip-pan, brief focus hunting then re-focusing, finally pulling back into a comic cover-style composition. Continuous 'out-of-control' long-take feel.
Style: American comic cover composition, 3D mecha weight, Japanese swordsman action, cold cinematic grading, intense storm atmosphere.

Negative: Low resolution, cheap game graphics, plastic CGI, character face distortion, eye drift, fused fingers, extra fingers, katana distortion/disappearance, mecha scale errors, mecha melting, character face swap, clothing drift, camera completely out of control, unreadable action, excessive glare, light pollution, magic energy balls, cartoon explosions, gore, watermarks, subtitles, logos, garbled text, sudden scene changes, urban background, switching from 3D to pure 2D.

Technical: Ultra-realistic, 4K HDR, 35mm anamorphic lens, cinematic motion blur, practical creature realism, high-budget disaster movie energy.

SHOT 1 — 0–3s (THE HOOK)

The sequence begins mid-action.

A giant octopus is already climbing through the harbor.

Its massive tentacles wrap around cargo containers and rip them from their stacks.

Metal screams.

Containers crash into the docks below.

A dock worker sprints across the tops of stacked shipping containers.

The camera races backward in front of him.

Behind him—

A gigantic tentacle smashes down, crushing the container he was standing on seconds earlier.

SHOT 2 — 3–6s

The worker leaps across a gap between container stacks.

Barely making it.

The octopus follows.

Tentacles sweep across the harbor.

One wraps around a crane tower.

Another tears apart a fishing boat below.

The camera flies through the chaos as waves crash against the docks.

The worker keeps running.

SHOT 3 — 6–9s

Dead end.

Nothing ahead but open air and stormy ocean.

He turns.

The octopus rises higher.

Its enormous body emerging from the harbor.

Tentacles spreading outward.

Blocking every escape route.

Then—

The worker notices a massive shipping container suspended from a crane directly above the creature.

SHOT 4 — 9–12s

The octopus advances.

Tentacles reaching.

Closer.

Closer.

The worker pulls a crane remote from his belt.

Rain pouring down.

He waits until the last possible second.

Then slams the release button.

SHOT 5 — 12–15s (BULLET-TIME PAYOFF)

Bullet time.

The suspended shipping container drops.

Rain droplets hang frozen in the air.

Steel cables whip loose.

The octopus looks up.

Too late.

The container crashes directly onto its head.

The impact drives the entire creature backward.

Tentacles flailing.

Water exploding upward.

title: Alien Creature Highway Bridge Attack
description: A dramatic multi-shot cinematic prompt featuring a giant alien attacking a highway bridge and being countered by a soldier and a brave police officer.
promptText:
A gigantic alien creature — wet black skin, many glowing eyes, and a long whip-like tongue — stands over a busy highway bridge in bright daylight. It uses its tongue to grab moving cars off the road and lift them up to its mouth. An army truck with a big anti-aircraft gun is parked further down the bridge. Sound: screaming traffic, crunching metal, the alien's wet roar, gun motors, radio chatter. 

 Shot 1 (0–3s) — THE HOOK: Low shot along the bridge. The giant alien's tongue whips out and wraps around a speeding car, lifting it high into the air toward its open mouth full of teeth. Other cars swerve and crash. Inside a police car, our hero — a young cop — slams the brakes, staring up through the windshield, shouting into his radio: "IT'S PICKING UP CARS! IT'S EATING THEM OFF THE ROAD!"  

Shot 2 (3–6s): At the army truck down the bridge. A soldier sits behind the big anti-aircraft gun, swinging the barrel up toward the alien, but holding fire — the alien's mouth is shut. He shouts on the radio: "I can only hurt it when its mouth opens! Somebody make it open wide — then I fire!"  

Shot 3 (6–9s): The alien creatures tongue suddenly wraps the hero's police car and lifts it upside down, high over the alien's open jaws. Inside, hanging from his seatbelt, the cop pulls out his shotgun, points it down through his own windshield at the alien's mouth below, and yells: "OPEN WIDE!" He fires. The alien roars in pain, its huge mouth opening wide.  

Shot 4 (9–14s) — BULLET TIME PAYOFF: The mouth is open. Bullet time — the soldier in the tank sees his chance fires the anti-aircraft gun in slow motion, a stream of glowing shells flying across the bridge straight into the alien creatures open mouth, the alien's head jerking back, black blood and broken teeth hanging in the air. The tongue lets go of the car.  

Shot 5 (14–15s): Time snaps back. The huge alien folds backward and crashes down over the bridge railing, sliding off into the river below. The police car drops onto the road and bounces, the cop climbing out, shotgun still in hand. Smoke drifts across the bridge.

title: Ronaldo vs Messi Stage Battle

Cheers escalate to a massive roar by 15s. Effort grunts on each strike. No music. No dialogue. Photorealistic, documentary handheld aesthetic, shot from a distance.

title: Megalodon vs Seaplane Cinematic Chase
description: A detailed multi-shot video prompt depicting a massive megalodon attacking a seaplane in a high-speed chase across a lake, featuring a patrol boat intervention and a cinematic rocket explosion payoff.
promptText:
A massive megalodon, huge as a whale with grey scarred skin, has clamped onto the left float of a small seaplane as it races across a wide lake in bright daylight. The plane is at full speed, hopping and banging across the water with the big fish holding on. A patrol boat speeds alongside, a crew member braced at the front with a launcher on his shoulder. Sound: roaring propeller, splashing water, creaking metal, water churning, radio voices.

Shot 1 (0–3s) — THE HOOK: Fast side tracking shot just above the water. The seaplane rushes across the lake at full power, spray flying everywhere — and the megalodon has its huge mouth shut tight on the left float, pulling the plane's nose down. The plane skips and leans hard to one side. Inside, the pilot wrestles the controls and shouts on his radio: "IT'S PULLING ME DOWN! DROP THE FLOAT — I'LL SHAKE IT LOOSE!"

Shot 2 (3–5s): On the patrol boat racing beside the plane. The crew member kneels at the front, lowers his eye to the launcher sight, and aims steadily at the water beside the plane, finger ready on the trigger. He gives one short nod and speaks low: "Drop it. I'm ready."

Shot 3 (5–8s): Inside the shaking cockpit. The pilot reaches down, grips the red release handle, and pulls it hard. Outside — the pins pop and the damaged float breaks away. The megalodon drops back into the lake with the float in its mouth, and the plane leaps forward, suddenly light and free.

Shot 4 (8–12s) — BIG SLOW-MOTION MOMENT: On the boat, the crew member FIRES — a clear shot of the launcher kicking back, smoke bursting from the tube, the rocket streaking out across the water. At that exact moment the megalodon bursts up out of the lake and leaps high into the air, the broken float still in its mouth. title: Stormy Cargo Ship Runner Action
description: A hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence of a runner navigating the top of stacked containers on a cargo ship during a violent ocean storm.
promptText:
Hyper-realistic cinematic action sequence, 15 seconds, aspect ratio 16:9.  

At night during a violent ocean storm, a lone runner in dark waterproof gear races across the tops of stacked cargo containers on a massive cargo ship. The sea is rough, waves crash against the ship, rain lashes the deck, and powerful wind shakes everything. The containers are wet, slippery, and unstable. No visible face.  

Wide opening shot: the cargo ship cuts through the stormy sea. The runner sprints across the top of stacked containers as lightning flashes in the distance. Some containers shift and tilt as the ship rolls with the waves.  Side tracking shot: the runner jumps from one container to another while nearby containers slide out of position. Metal scrapes against metal, rain hits hard, and ocean spray bursts upward from below.

Dynamic front three-quarter shot: the ship tilts sharply. A row of containers begins to slip and fall toward the edge. The runner keeps moving, making quick jumps across narrowing gaps as containers drop away into the sea.  Final 5 seconds: the action becomes more intense. Several containers slide at once, creating a chain reaction. One container tips and crashes off the ship into the ocean. 

The runner leaps across a widening gap, lands hard on a tilted container, regains balance, then makes one final desperate jump to a stable section near the ship’s upper deck while waves explode below.  Final moment: the runner reaches safer footing as more containers crash into the sea behind, with storm, lightning, and spray filling the background.  

Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic, fast-paced, strong sense of danger and motion, stormy ocean, rain, wind, metal surfaces, crashing waves, dynamic but readable camera movement, no visible face, no celebrity resemblance, no text, no logos, no cartoon style, no slow motion. title: Pixar Style World Cup Animation

title: Oriental Fantasy Martial Arts Masterpiece

[00:00-00:01] Shot 1: Crash Landing (Speed-Ramp). Extreme long shot: a pillar of golden glowing particles falls rapidly from the hazy sky. At the moment of landing, cut to super slow-mo, close-up of the lace-up high heels stepping heavily on the cracked ground, dust exploding and cracks radiating outward.
[00:01-00:02] Shot 2: Fan Opening (Power Burst / Wide). Panoramic fixed shot: the woman spins on one leg in front of the army, sweeping her fan to create a massive golden ring shockwave. Dark battlefield is lit by golden light.

[00:05-00:07] Shot 4: Clone Suppression (Bullet-time / Low-angle Push-in). Panoramic low-angle shot, camera moves forward very slowly. The woman stands on one leg with fan open, multiple white residual clones appearing behind her. Soldiers are frozen in mid-air.
[00:07-00:09] Shot 5: Goddess Apparition (Epic Scale / Slow Tilt-up). Extreme long shot tilting up: the woman stands in the center, a giant semi-transparent glowing goddess apparition rising behind her. The apparition forms a giant sword.
[00:09-00:11] Shot 6: Fire Dragon Devour (Hollywood VFX / Handheld Shake). Long shot to extreme long shot, camera shakes violently. Multiple fire dragons erupt from ground cracks, causing a nuclear-level explosion and giant mushroom cloud. The woman stands unmoved at the center.
[00:11-00:14] Shot 7: Ruins Walk (Slow Push-in). Extreme long shot to medium panoramic, steady slow push. The woman walks toward the camera through burning ruins and smoke, embers falling slowly around her.
[00:14-00:15] Shot 8: Cold Glance (Near Shot / Subtle Breathing). Medium to close-up, fixed camera almost still. The woman looks directly into the lens, calm and indifferent, with realistic wind simulation on clothes and hair.

title: Sci-Fi Anti-Gravity Rider Video

promptText:

Pilot: lone anti-gravity rider in sleek white flight armor with illuminated blue accents, aerodynamic helmet, fearless expression, riding a futuristic hoverbike Camera points upward through thick clouds. A gigantic floating city is breaking apart overhead. Entire skyscrapers drift downward like asteroids. Monorails twist through the sky. The Pilot bursts into frame on a hoverbike, diving through the falling debris field. SFX: atmospheric roar, distant structural collapse, deep synth drone. 
Tracking shot beside the Pilot racing between collapsing towers. Buildings rotate slowly in freefall. Neon signs tumble through the air. A giant transit station tears apart behind her. VFX: sparks, falling holograms, debris trails. SFX: rushing wind, metal tearing, engine scream. 
A colossal orbital defense machine awakens among the wreckage. Rotating rings spin around its glowing core. The machine locks onto the Pilot and begins pursuit through the collapsing city. VFX: targeting lasers, reactor glow, energy pulses. SFX: warning alarms, reactor hum, heavy machinery. 
The Pilot accelerates through an upside-down skyscraper drifting through the atmosphere. Windows explode outward. Debris rushes past the camera as the defense machine fires massive energy blasts through the falling city. SFX: energy cannon discharge, sonic booms, collapsing steel. 
Epic ultra-wide shot. The Pilot escapes the debris field as the entire floating metropolis ignites during atmospheric reentry. Thousands of burning structures streak across the sky behind her like a man-made meteor shower. SFX: orchestral synth climax, atmospheric burn, final cinematic impact.

title: Hyper-Realistic Pro Surfing Video Prompt
description: A comprehensive cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a professional surfer navigating a massive barrel wave with high-end physics and single-take camera movements.
promptText: [Character Lock] Strictly refer to Image 1 and the created surfboard character sheet. Maintain the exact face of the same female character, pale and clean skin tone, long black hair, blue eyes, body proportions (33C-26-34), and the floral pattern female surf suit defined in the character sheet. Do not change the costume, face, body type, hairstyle, color scheme, logo, or design elements. Keep the same surfboard. The character should look like a real professional surfer and perform world-class surfing skills that are dangerous but realistically believable. [Environment] Open ocean in bright daylight. Deep and clear blue sea water. Strong sunlight reflection. Massive waves. Dynamic spray. Strong sea breeze. The overall atmosphere should be fast, rough, thrilling, and extremely realistic. [Video Style] Hyper-cinematic 15-second continuous single take. Absolutely no cuts. No hidden cuts. No transitions. No montage. One complete continuous shot. Hyper-realistic action. Natural motion blur. Water droplets on the lens. Sea water hitting the camera. Strong wave sounds. Friction sound of the board cutting the surface. Wind sound. Real human body weight shifts and balance adjustments should be naturally expressed. The entire video must be immersive and physically realistic. [Opening Shot] At the start of the video, the character is already riding a massive wave. The camera starts at a very close position right in front of her. The frame focuses on her face and upper body. Long wet black hair blows in the wind. Her expression is calm, fearless, and perfectly focused. Strong sunlight reflects off the water. Sea water moves rapidly under the surfboard. [Camera Movement] The camera starts briefly in front of her upper body and then moves to the rear in one smooth, seamless motion, rotating around her body. Upon reaching the rear, the camera immediately drops to surfboard height. From then on, until the end of the video, the camera always maintains a low position close to the surface. It tracks from behind near the tail or rail of the board. Never move to a high angle. Always maintain the feeling of chasing the surfboard from behind. [Action Flow] Once the camera is fixed at board height behind her, she accelerates strongly in a deep crouch. She leans her upper body aggressively forward and races along the wave wall. She performs the first powerful bottom turn. The surfboard rail digs deep into the surface, and a massive spray explodes behind her. This is followed by a rapid climb up the wave face for an aggressive carving turn. A strong spray from the board tail explodes, hitting the camera lens. She immediately reaches one hand down to perform a hand drag. Her fingertips graze the water surface for a long time, and a stream of water scatters behind. The camera tracks this closely from right behind the board. She speeds up into a steeper section of the wave. [Aerial Moment] Upon reaching the lip of the wave, she launches strongly and performs a high-difficulty aerial. She soars high into the air with the surfboard. Time shifts into dramatic slow motion. The camera still follows the aerial maneuver from a low position at board height. She rotates her upper body toward the camera. She strikes a stylish pose while grabbing the board with one hand. Wet black hair flutters in the air. Numerous water droplets float around, reflecting the sunlight. The surfboard design is clearly visible. She finishes the aerial while maintaining perfect balance. [Landing and Acceleration] She naturally returns to her stance and lands cleanly on the wave. A massive spray explodes at the moment of landing. The camera still follows right behind at board height. Immediately after landing, she performs continuous strong pumping to maximize speed. She shifts her center of gravity rapidly forward and backward, accelerating even harder. The surfboard glides across the water surface. [Barrel Entry] A massive hollow wave forms in front. She crouches deeper in a low stance. She enters toward the inside line of the wave wall. A massive lip begins to collapse over her head. The camera follows right behind her, maintaining board height. Peripheral vision gradually darkens. The wave walls rise on both sides. A massive water tunnel is formed. [Barrel Riding] She passes through the inside of a deep barrel at top speed. She races along the center of the tunnel while maintaining perfect balance. She reaches her front hand near the wave wall to graze the ripple. Water droplets scatter from her fingertips. The camera tracks the inside of the tunnel from right behind the board tail. A massive ceiling of water rotates overhead. Sunlight passing through the transparent water wall reflects in blue light. Numerous water particles float in the air. The strong light of the tunnel exit is visible in the distance. The sound of the waves echoes like thunder. All movement is maintained within a single continuous take. [Barrel Exit and Final Scene] She rushes toward the tunnel exit at top speed. The light ahead becomes stronger. A massive wall of water collapses from behind. She maintains perfect balance until the last moment. The moment she exits the tunnel, an explosive spray bursts in all directions. Intense sunlight fills the screen. She finally passes just below the wave lip, drawing a high-speed line. Massive sprays explode on both sides. Water droplets constantly splash on the lens. The massive wave wall in front gets closer. The camera maintains the same low tracking angle. She continues her full-speed dash in a steady posture. The video ends at the moment she continues to rush toward the massive wave. No text. No logo. No subtitles. Ultra Realistic Water Physics. Extreme Surfing Action. Deep Barrel Ride. Inside The Tube. Heavy Hollow Wave. Aggressive Carving. Ha
